com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint

Interface IXModuleAssignationTechnicalConstraint<XMC extends IXModuleCode>

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXConstraint, IXPlugin
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXFunctionalModuleAssignationTechnicalConstraint, IXProductionModuleAssignationTechnicalConstraint

    @NotToBeImplementedDirectly
public interface IXModuleAssignationTechnicalConstraint<XMC extends IXModuleCode>
extends IXConstraint
    Custom Constraint allows control of how a specific object should be assigned technical module codes.

    Three types of assignation are possible.

    Single object assignation - IXModuleAssignationObjectAlgorithmConstraint
    Single object technical assignation - IXModuleAssignationTechnicalConstraint
    Design / Multiple Object assignation - IXModuleAssignationConstraint

    This constraint can be used to assign technical module codes when either the standard Capital assignation algorithm, or custom plugins (IXModuleAssignationObjectAlgorithmConstraint) fail to assign non-technical module codes.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean assignModuleCodes(IXModuledObject object, java.util.List<IXWire> wires, IXModuleAssignationResult<XMC> result)
      Method to allow an object to have module codes assigned.
      boolean shouldObjectBeAssigned(IXModuledObject object, IXModuleAssignationResult<XMC> result)
      Determine if technical module codes be created for this object?

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion

    • Method Detail

      • shouldObjectBeAssigned

        boolean shouldObjectBeAssigned(IXModuledObject object,
                               IXModuleAssignationResult<XMC> result)
        Determine if technical module codes be created for this object?
        Parameters:
        object - the moduled object being analyzed
        result - Stores the result containing how the object should be assigned, module codes to be created and added to the design / project
        Returns:
        boolean - true if technical module code assignation should be performed on this object

      • assignModuleCodes

        boolean assignModuleCodes(IXModuledObject object,
                          java.util.List<IXWire> wires,
                          IXModuleAssignationResult<XMC> result)
        Method to allow an object to have module codes assigned.
        Parameters:
        object - the object being analyzed
        wires - the list of "driving" wires for the given object
        result - Stores the result containing how the object should be assigned, module codes to be created and added to the design / project
        Returns:
        true if module codes should be added to the object
